specializations: Exosome-based actives for skin and hair rejuvenation
product_highlights: PlantExo™ — plant-derived exosomes for skin renewal and anti-aging
HairRevive™ — exosome-based scalp and hair follicle rejuvenation active
Custom exosome development from plant, milk, or bio-fermented sources
Exosome characterization and quantification services for cosmetic formulators
notes: Exocel Bio is an emerging US biotechnology company specializing in plant-derived exosome technology for skin and hair care applications. Exosomes — nanoscale extracellular vesicles packed with growth factors, lipids, and nucleic acids — represent one of the most exciting frontiers in cosmetic science, enabling truly biointelligent skin-to-skin communication signals. Exocel Bio's plant-derived positioning offers a vegan and sustainable alternative to the MSC exosome market, making them a forward-looking SKIN-TWIN reference for the rapidly growing exosome actives category.
